title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Liberty Shoes

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Liberty Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
